! Title: AdBlock DNS
! Description: 适用于AdGuard的去广告合并规则，每8个小时更新一次。规则源：1Hosts (Lite)、ADgk、AdGuard Base filter、AdGuard Base filter、AdGuard DNS filter、AdRules DNS List、Hblock、NEO DEV HOST、OISD Basic、1024 hosts、ad-wars hosts、StevenBlack hosts、xinggsf、EasyList、Easylist China、EasyPrivacy、CJX's Annoyance List、SmartTV Blocklist
! Homepage: https://github.com/217heidai/adblockfilters
! Source: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/217heidai/adblockfilters/main/rules/adblockdns.txt
